# Citing Project

This repo implements the algorithm of [1] with extensions from
[Smith et al. (2024)](https://arxiv.org/abs/2401.12345). For
the biology applications see (Doe and Lee, 2023).

## Performance

Our system achieves an electrostatic relative error less than
0.02 on the standard benchmark.

## References

[1] Smith, J. and Jones, K. (2024). A great algorithm.
    *Journal of Important Stuff*, 12(3), 45-67.
    https://doi.org/10.1234/jis.2024.012

[2] Doe, A. and Lee, B. (2023). Biology applications of the
    algorithm. https://www.biorxiv.org/content/10.1101/2023.05.12.540321v2.full.pdf

[3] OpenReview submission. https://openreview.net/forum?id=ABC123
